text: my phone hit 20% and i started rationing apps like its the apocalypse
someone stole my charger at work again. i will find you and i will judge you
143 unread notifications and im choosing peace today. theyre staying unread
left the group chat and they added me back in 4 minutes. there is no escape
spent 20 min analyzing if that 'ok' text was passive aggressive. it was
read receipts are the worst invention since someone decided to put raisins in cookies
i have 3 voicemails and id rather mass delete than listen to any of them
phone died during navigation and now im in a town ive never heard of
the group chat has 847 messages from last night. im not scrolling thru all that
my charger only works at a specific angle. one sneeze and its over
got a 'we need to talk' text and my soul left my body for 10 minutes
someone left me a voicemail in 2024. what kind of psychopath
phone at 5% and the uber is 8 min away. this is how i die
muted the family group chat 6 months ago. best decision of my life
they sent a thumbs up emoji and i cant tell if theyre mad or not
my read receipts exposed me and now i have to explain why i didnt reply for 3 hrs
borrowed a charger from a stranger at the airport. we bonded. besties now
47 notifications from one group chat in 10 min. yall need hobbies
the period at the end of 'fine.' carries so much weight i need therapy
phone went from 30% to dead in 2 minutes. math aint mathing
my mom leaves voicemails that are just 40 seconds of silence then 'call me'
someone texted me 'lol' and nothing else. what do i do with that
group chat renamed itself 4 times today. i dont even know where i am anymore
carrying a charger everywhere like its an emotional support animal
notification sound gives me anxiety now. i put everything on silent permanently
they left me on read for 6 hours then sent a meme. no acknowledgment. nothing
my phone battery percentage is my mood percentage. were both at 12
a]voicemail transcription said 'unintelligible' for the whole message. helpful thx
someone called me without texting first. absolutely unhinged behavior
i have 4 chargers and none of them are usb-c. my new phone is usb-c
the three dots appearing and disappearing is psychological warfare
accidentally opened a msg now they know i saw it. cant pretend anymore
group chat at 2am debating if a hot dog is a sandwich. i just wanna sleep
my battery health is at 79% and it shows. this phone is elderly
plugged my phone in and it said 'accessory not supported'. its YOUR charger apple
someone sent 14 texts in a row instead of one paragraph. my phone had a seizure
turned off read receipts and now ppl think im hiding something. i am. my anxiety
the work group chat is 90% stuff that couldve been an email. or nothing at all
charged my phone to 100% before bed. woke up to 43%. what happened overnight
got added to a group chat with 27 people. i already wanna leave
analyzing the difference between haha and hahaha at 1am like its my thesis
my charger cable is so frayed its basically two wires and a prayer
someone replied 'k' and i assumed the worst. turns out they were just busy
phone buzzing nonstop during a meeting. its the group chat. its always the group chat
i listen to voicemails on 2x speed like theyre podcasts i didnt subscribe to
low battery mode is just my phone telling me to touch grass
my friend sends voice messages and i have to find a private spot to listen every time
notification said 'your screen time is up 40%' thanks for the callout apple
that moment when ur phone dies and u realize u dont know anyones number
someone double texted me and i felt powerful for exactly 3 seconds
the charging port on my phone is so loose i have to tape the cable in place
got a text that just said 'hey' and now im spiraling about what they want
left 3 group chats this week. my phone is so peaceful now
my phone died at the grocery store and i couldnt remember what i needed. chaos
read receipts should be opt-in not opt-out. who designed this nightmare
someone sent '...' as a whole text message. what does that MEAN
portable charger died too. the backup has no backup. im truly alone
notification from 6 apps at once when i turn off airplane mode. sensory overload
i text back in 2 sec and they take 2 days. the math is not equal here
someone called me twice in a row so i assumed someone died. they wanted lunch plans
my phones at 1% and im speed typing this like its my last words
group chat memes at 3am. i love yall but also please stop
the person who invented push notifications owes me sleep
saw the typing bubble for 5 min and they sent 'nvm'. WHAT WAS IT
i have chargers in every room and still somehow end up with a dead phone
got a work email notification at 11pm. im pretending i didnt see it until monday
my phone autocorrected my apology text and made it worse. much worse
someone left me a 2 minute voicemail. two minutes. thats a ted talk
the group chat has 4 side chats now. its like a cinematic universe
when my phone hits 50% i start panicking. 50% used to feel safe. not anymore
texted the wrong person something about them. phone should have a confirm button
i have 12,847 unread emails and at this point its an aesthetic choice
someone hearted my message instead of replying. thats a conversation ender huh
charged my phone at a restaurant and the waiter unplugged it for the blender
voicemail greeting still says my name wrong from when i set it up at 14
the do not disturb feature saved my sanity. i owe apple one compliment
cant leave the group chat bc they'll see the 'x left the group' message
battery saver mode turns my screen so dim i need a flashlight to see my phone
my friend replies to texts from 3 days ago like no time has passed. unreal
phone overheated in the sun and shut down. even my phone needs shade
the notification badge showing 99+ is not a flex its a cry for help
i reply to voicemails with texts. adapting not adopting old technology
someone sent a text with no context and expected me to just know. i did not know
wireless charger stopped working so now i just place my phone on it and hope
phone fell off the charger overnight so i woke up to 4%. great start
that anxiety when someone screenshots your conversation. what r u archiving
group chat voted on dinner for 2 hours then everyone ate separately anyway
if u call me without warning i am simply not answering. text first. always
found a charger in the junk drawer from 2016 and it still works better than my new one
my phones battery graph looks like a stock market crash
someone texted 'can i ask you something' then went offline. im calling the police
i have notifications from apps i dont remember installing. who are you
turning on do not disturb for 'one hour' three weeks ago. still on. no regrets
read the text meant to reply later and now its been 5 days. too late now right
my phone died mid argument over text. they think i rage quit. i kinda did but not on purpose
every charger i buy lasts exactly 3 months then spontaneously stops working
the notification sound for teams triggers my fight or flight at this point
someone unsent a message and now ill never know what it said. im haunted
texted 'sounds good!' with an exclamation point so they know im not mad. am i mad? idk
my phone has 47 apps sending notifications and i use maybe 6 of them
